EntrepreneurProfile.title: EntrepreneurProfile
EntrepreneurProfile.description: Represents the profile of an entrepreneur using the EmprendeIA platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Entrepreneur profile.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 EntrepreneurProfile)

businessName.description: The name of the entrepreneur's business.

businessDescription.description: A description of the entrepreneur's business.

SupplierProfile.title: SupplierProfile
SupplierProfile.description: Represents the profile of a supplier on the EmprendeIA platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Supplier profile.

userId.description: Reference to the User account associated with this profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 SupplierProfile)

companyName.description: The name of the supplier's company.

companyDescription.description: A description of the supplier's company and services.

location.description: The location of the supplier (e.g., city, state).

contactInfo.description: Contact information for the supplier (e.g., phone, email).

verified.description: Indicates if the supplier has been verified by EmprendeIA.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product or service offered by a supplier.

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier offering this product. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N Product)

category.description: The category of product for the item, such as 'Espresso Machines' or 'Organic Coffee'

Recommendation.title: Recommendation
Recommendation.description: Represents a product/supplier recommendation generated by the AI.

entrepreneurId.description: Reference to the Entrepreneur receiving this recommendation. (Relationship: Entrepreneur 1:N Recommendation)

productId.description: Reference to the recommended Product. (Relationship: Product 1:N Recommendation)

supplierId.description: Reference to the recommended Supplier. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N Recommendation)

reason.description: The reason for the recommendation, generated by the AI.

Membership.title: Membership
Membership.description: Represents a membership subscription for either entrepreneurs or suppliers.

userId.description: Reference to the User owning this membership. (Relationship: User 1:N Membership)

membershipType.description: The type of membership (e.g., 'Entrepreneur Premium', 'Supplier Premium').

startDate.description: The start date of the membership.

endDate.description: The end date of the membership.

UserReview.title: UserReview
UserReview.description: Represents a user review of a supplier.

entrepreneurId.description: Reference to the Entrepreneur writing the review. (Relationship: Entrepreneur 1:N UserReview)

supplierId.description: Reference to the Supplier being reviewed. (Relationship: Supplier 1:N UserReview)

rating.description: The rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars).

comment.description: The user's comment about the supplier.

date.description: The date the review was created.

definition.description: Stores entrepreneur profiles, associated with a specific user. Includes 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user owning the entrepreneur profile.

definition.description: Stores supplier profiles, associated with a specific user. Includes 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user owning the supplier profile.

definition.description: Stores products offered by a supplier.

params.name: supplierId
params.description: The ID of the supplier offering the product.

params.name: entrepreneurId
params.description: The ID of the entrepreneur receiving the recommendation.

definition.description: Stores membership information for entrepreneurs and suppliers. Includes 'userId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user owning the membership.

params.name: supplierId
params.description: The ID of the supplier being reviewed.

params.name: userReviewId
params.description: The ID of the user review.

firestore.reasoning:
This Firestore structure prioritizes authorization independence and efficient data retrieval for the EmprendeIA marketplace. It leverages path-based ownership for user-specific data (Entrepreneur and Supplier profiles, Memberships) and denormalization to avoid `get()` calls in security rules, ensuring atomic operations and improved security. Segregation of data by type (profiles, products, recommendations, reviews, memberships) simplifies security rules and optimizes query performance.

*   **Authorization Independence:** The `userId` field is present in `EntrepreneurProfile`, `SupplierProfile`, and `Membership` documents, enabling security rules to validate ownership based solely on the `request.auth.uid` without needing to fetch parent documents.
*   **QAPs Support:**
    *   Secure `list` operations are supported by segregating data into collections with homogeneous security requirements. For example, listing products only requires checking the supplier ID.
    *   The path-based ownership for user data (e.g., `/users/{userId}/entrepreneur_profile`) ensures that only the user can access their profile.
*   **Structure:** Employs a consistent hierarchical structure for user-owned data (profiles, memberships) and a flat structure for globally accessible or managed data (products, recommendations, reviews).
*   **DBAC:** roles are stored in the DB. Authorization relies solely on `request.auth.uid`.
